text: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to apply for the Python Developer position. In my recent work, I built REST APIs, optimized PostgreSQL queries, and automated data pipelines that improved reliability and reduced manual work. I am particularly drawn to roles where I can contribute to scalable backend systems and deliver measurable business impact. My background in Python, API development, and cloud deployment aligns well with your requirements, and I would welcome the opportunity to bring that experience to your team. Thank you for your consideration.
